title: Dalek Mod: All Dimensions Plus
description: A Dalek Mod 1.12.2 addon that enhances and expands the dimensions selector.
body:
# Dalek Mod: All Dimensions Plus (Addon)
A [Dalek Mod](https://swdteam.com/p/dalek-mod) (**1.12.2**) addon that enhances and expands the dimensions selector.

## Features
- **Automatic Dimension Integration** - automatically adds all available dimensions, including those from other mods to the dimensions selector. Must be installed on both the client and server.
- **Custom Planet Icons** - add custom planet icons via a resource pack.
- **Dimension Blacklist** - hide specific dimensions from the dimensional selector. *(This already exists in the Dalek Mod config but was never implemented)*
- **Dimension Renaming** - change the displayed name of a dimension in the selector.
- **Dimension Reordering** - customize the order of the displayed dimensions in the selector.

### Planned Features
- **Singleplayer Support** - this mod currently supports **multiplayer only**.

### Custom Planet Icons Instructions
Custom planet icons can be added using a resource pack. Icons need to be placed at:
`assets/thedalekmod/textures/gui/planet_icons/<dimensionname>.png`. 

`<dimensionname>` must match the original dimension name (renamed display names will not work). Use lowercase only and replace any special characters with `_`. You can also find the correct icon names in the Minecraft log (`log/latest.log`), after starting the game with the mod installed, by searching the log for `planet icon:`.


*Example:* For [Galacticraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/galacticraft-legacy)’s Moon and Mars dimensions (named: `moon.moon` and `planet.mars`), the required icon filenames would be `moon_moon.png` and `planet_mars.png`.


## Based On
This project builds on the great work of the people below - check out their projects!
- Bug1312's [Dalek Mod: All Dimensions Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/dm_all_dims), the original 1.16.5 addon.
- Azures04's [DM (legacy): All dimensions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dm-all-dimensions), a 1.12.2 port of the original 1.16.5 addon, the foundation of this addon.
- Averash's [DM: All Dims with Images](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dm-all-dimensions-with-images), adds support for custom planet images to the 1.16.5 addon.


## Bug Reports & Feature Requests
Found a bug or have an idea for something cool? Let me know via the [issues tracker](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dalek-mod-all-dimensions-plus/issues) :)
